---
title: "New data tool: EMDE research lab tracker (EMDER)"
description: |
  A new tool to keep track of R&D labs in emerging and developing economies
  that are associated with patented innovation or that appear in the JRC
  scoreboard list of the biggest R&D investing companies.
author:
  - name: Ralf Martin
    url: https://mondpanther.github.io/wwwmondpanther/
date: 2026-06-29
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
categories:
  - Innovation
  - R&D
  - Emerging Economies
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

There is the widespread perception that not much R&D happens in developing
countries, with the exception of perhaps China. Indeed, many have been
surprised by the recent rise of China as an innovation superpower.

However, innovation happens in many emerging and developing economies (EMDE).
I built a new tool to keep track of R&D labs in EMDE that are associated with
patented innovation or that appear in the JRC scoreboard list of the biggest
R&D investing companies.

Explore the tool here: **[EMDER](https://mondpanther.github.io/kevceinsights/mnc-rd-labs-map.html)**.
